Notice Of Motion To Continue Arbirtation Hearing Date And Extend Time To Arbitrate
MINI MINUTES: Shean Sullivan, Esq., appearing for Intervenor GES.
Defendant AB Transfer Company and Alfredo Juarez Gomez's Motion to continue Arbitration Hearing Date and to Extend Time to Arbitrate is heard this day. There being no appearance by the moving party of opposing party. Court adopted tentative ruling to grant motion. Motion is ordered granted. The Arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 11/12/2002. The Arbitration OSC is re-set to 12/19/2002 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR# 11288. (212)
